flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lincoln Christian University rose 55% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.1k → $9.5k).

flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Lincoln Christian University fell 41% between 2006 and 2009 (30.0% → 17.6%).

flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lincoln Christian University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($11.1k → $13.0k).
